meta.title: AWS Overseas Mobile App | Ship Smarter, Track Faster
meta.description: Download the AWS Overseas mobile app to book shipments, track cargo, upload documents, make secure payments, receive real-time notifications, and manage your shipping from anywhere.

hero.title: Manage Your Global Shipments Anytime, Anywhere
hero.subtitle: Experience hassle-free international shipping with the AWS Overseas Mobile App. Book shipments, track cargo, upload documents, make secure payments, and receive real-time updates—all from your smartphone.

download.title: Available on Android & iOS
download.description: Download the AWS Overseas app and manage every shipment from your mobile device.

screenshots.title: Explore the App Experience
screenshots.description: Designed with a modern, intuitive interface that makes managing shipments simple and efficient.

shipmentTracking.title: Real-Time Shipment Tracking
shipmentTracking.description: Track every shipment from pickup to delivery with live status updates and shipment history.

bookShipment.title: Book Shipments in Minutes
bookShipment.description: Create new shipment requests directly from the app without visiting the office.

uploadDocuments.title: Upload Documents Securely
uploadDocuments.description: Upload invoices, shipping documents, customs paperwork, and other required files directly from your phone.

payments.title: Fast & Secure Payments
payments.description: Pay for your shipments securely using multiple payment methods with instant confirmation.

notifications.title: Stay Updated with Every Shipment
notifications.description: Receive instant notifications throughout your shipping journey so you're always informed.

referEarn.title: Refer & Earn Rewards
referEarn.description: Invite friends and business partners to AWS Overseas and earn rewards when they complete their first shipment.

items.question: Is the AWS Overseas app free to download?
items.answer: Yes. The application is completely free on both Android and iOS.

items.question: Can I track shipments from the app?
items.answer: Yes. You can monitor shipment status in real time from pickup to final delivery.

items.question: Can I upload shipping documents?
items.answer: Yes. The app allows secure upload and management of shipment-related documents.

items.question: Which payment methods are supported?
items.answer: UPI, Credit Cards, Debit Cards, Net Banking, and Wallet Payments.

items.question: Can I book a shipment using the app?
items.answer: Yes. You can request quotes, create bookings, and manage shipments directly from the app.

items.question: How does Refer & Earn work?
items.answer: Share your referral code, invite new customers, and earn rewards when they successfully complete eligible shipments.
